eventCompleted.title: Raid completed: {event}

eventCreated.title: New raid scheduled: {eventTitle} {guildTag}
eventCreated.body: A new raid has been scheduled{starts}. Sign up now!

eventLocked.title: Signups closed: {event}
eventLocked.body: Signups are now closed for "{eventTitle}". The roster is being finalized.

eventUpdated.title: Raid updated: {event}
eventUpdated.body: Event details for "{eventTitle}" have been updated. Check for any schedule or roster changes.

guildRoleChanged.title: Rank changed to {role} in {guildName} {guildTag}
guildRoleChanged.body: Your rank has been changed to {role}.

memberJoined.title: New member joined {guildName} {guildTag}
memberJoined.body: A new member has joined your guild.

officerLineupChanged.title: Lineup updated for {eventTitle}
officerLineupChanged.body: Another officer has modified the raid lineup for {eventTitle}.

newOwner.title: You are now the owner of {guildName} {guildTag}
newOwner.body: You have been granted full ownership of {guildName}. You now have all guild owner privileges and responsibilities.

oldOwner.title: Guild ownership transferred for {guildName} {guildTag}
oldOwner.body: You are no longer the owner of {guildName}. Your role has been changed to member.

queuePositionChanged.title: {character} is now #{position} in queue for {event}
queuePositionChanged.body: {character} is now #{position} in the {role} bench queue for {eventTitle}.

removedFromGuild.title: Removed from {guildName} {guildTag}
removedFromGuild.body: You have been removed from this guild.

replacementConfirmed.title: Character swap accepted for {event}
replacementConfirmed.body: The player accepted the character swap from {oldCharacter} to {newCharacter} in {eventTitle}.

replacementDeclined.title: Character swap declined for {event}
replacementDeclined.body: The player declined the character swap for {character} in {eventTitle}.

replacementRequested.title: Character swap requested for {event}
replacementRequested.body: {officer} wants to replace {oldCharacter} with {newCharacter} in {eventTitle}.{reason} Please confirm, decline, or leave the raid.

roleChanged.title: {character} role changed for {event}
roleChanged.body: {character}'s role in {eventTitle} was changed from {oldRole} to {newRole}.

signupBenched.title: {character} benched for {event}
signupBenched.body: Your character {character} ({role}) is on the bench queue for {eventTitle}. You'll be auto-promoted if a spot opens up.

signupConfirmed.title: {character} confirmed for {event}
signupConfirmed.body: Your character {character} is signed up as {role} in {eventTitle}.

signupDeclined.title: {character} declined for {event}
signupDeclined.body: Your character {character} was declined by {officer} for {eventTitle}.

signupKicked.title: {character} permanently kicked from {event}
signupKicked.body: Your character {character} has been permanently kicked from {eventTitle} by {officer}. You cannot sign up with this character again for this raid.

signupPromoted.title: {character} promoted to roster for {event}
signupPromoted.body: A {role} slot opened up and {character} has been moved from the bench to the active roster!

signupRemoved.title: {character} removed from {event}
signupRemoved.body: Your character {character} was removed from {eventTitle} by {officer}.
